headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Deserves Some Love and 2 We Avoid
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

headline: Oil Stocks Look Tapped Out. Why It’s Time to Move Into Other Sectors.
summary: Oil popped 8% Thursday, but oil company stocks gained just 0.5%. It suggests the stocks already reflect most of the higher crude prices.

headline: ConocoPhillips CEO’s Big Stock Sale Tests Sentiment On Cash Returns
summary: Michael Ryan Lance, Chairman and CEO of ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP), sold more than 113,000 company shares on 31 March 2026. The transaction was valued at roughly US$15 million and represents a sizeable insider sale by the top executive. The sale adds a fresh data point for investors watching executive behavior, governance signals, and capital allocation at ConocoPhillips. ConocoPhillips is a major independent exploration and production company, so its leadership actions often attract close...
